\tzpentry{ID4925}{Hamiltonian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4925 introduces Hamiltonian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}(\mathbf{x}, \mathbf{u}, \mathbf{p}) = \mathbf{p}^T \mathbf{f}(\mathbf{x}, \mathbf{u}) \implies \frac{\partial \mathcal{H}}{\partial \mathbf{u}} = 0 \end{equation}
